description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard parcel, sealed with brown packing tape that is printed with the word 'POSTAL' in white. The box features a printed label on the side reading 'POSTAL EXPRESS' in bold white and blue letters, accompanied by a stylized toilet icon. The surface of the box shows some water stains and wear, suggesting it has been handled or exposed to moisture. There are also standard shipping symbols, including a fragile icon and a CE mark, printed on the top and sides. The overall appearance is typical of a package intended for express delivery services in urban environments.
description: A brown cardboard parcel with 'POSTAL EXPRESS' branding, sealed with printed tape and marked with shipping symbols and water stains.
description_view_0: The front and top of the parcel are visible, showing the 'POSTAL EXPRESS' label, toilet icon, and shipping tape with 'POSTAL' text.
description_view_1: The side and top of the parcel are visible, with the tape seam and partial shipping symbols, but the main label is less prominent.
description_view_2: The front and side of the parcel are visible, clearly displaying the 'POSTAL EXPRESS' label and some water stains.
description_view_3: The rear and top of the parcel are visible, with the tape seam and shipping symbols, but no visible branding.
